docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PIPER, RALPH N. AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, DURKE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PIPER, RALPH N. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, DURKE $2,095.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,487.16 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,596.16, RENEWAL OF OLD CASE # 782819 [ORIGINAL CASE], RENEWED AS #034820 ON 12-12-79.
